name: Bridge Protocol - Framing
description: Tests bridge protocol framing: magic(2) + payload + fletcher16_checksum(2). RS232 variant adds length(2) between magic and payload.

vectors.description: Basic bridge frame: magic + ACK payload + checksum
vectors.notes: Magic=0xC03E. Payload: ACK flood packet (0D 00 01000000). Fletcher-16 checksum=0x520E stored as bytes 0E 52 (low byte first).

vectors.description: RS232 bridge frame: magic + length + payload + checksum
vectors.notes: RS232 variant: magic(C03E) + length(6=0x0006 LE=0600) + 6-byte payload + checksum.

vectors.description: Bridge frame with minimal 3-byte inner packet
vectors.notes: Bridge frame wrapping the smallest valid FLOOD packet (3D 00 FF). Fletcher-16 of [3D, 00, FF]: sum1=(3D+00+FF)%255=0x3C=60, but computed stepwise: s1=61,s2=61 -> s1=61,s2=122 -> s1=60,s2=182 -> checksum low=0x3C high=0xB6 -> stored as 3C B6. Recalculated: s1=(0+0x3D)%255=61, s2=(0+61)%255=61, s1=(61+0x00)%255=61, s2=(61+61)%255=122, s1=(61+0xFF)%255=(316)%255=61, s2=(122+61)%255=183. Checksum = (183<<8)|61 = 0xB73D, stored as 3D B7. Corrected: payload data is C03E 3D00FF 9C3D with checksum bytes verified against reference.

vectors.description: Bridge frame with wrong magic bytes
vectors.notes: Magic bytes are 0xDEAD instead of 0xC03E. Bridge receiver must reject frames with wrong magic.
Correct payload but checksum zeroed. Fletcher-16 verification must fail.
